rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA ZEVALLOS VS. MARILYN CHAVEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moton For Leave To Amend Answer To File Dsiclaimer Of Interest Pursuant To Cccp 761.030;

DEFENDANT PNC BANK's Moton For Leave To Amend Answer To File Disclaimer Of Interest Pursuant To CCP 761.030 GRANTED. Moving party shall file and serve its amended answer forthwith. rulings.Case Title: BRIANNA MANNION et al VS. JOHN E. WAI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Pltf'S Special Interrogatories Number One And For Sanctions Against Deft'S Attorney Of Record Ashley Standfield
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 27, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF BRIANNA MANNION and TRAVIS LARIMER's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Paintiff's Special Interrogatories Number One And For Sanctions Against Defendant's Attorney Of Record Ashley Standfield DENIED as to Special Interrogatory number 1 as drafted. Overbroad. Request for Sanctions is denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HELENA HUOH VS. ARIEL BENTOLILA et al

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 27, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT ARIEL BENTOLILA and ABENET TEKIE's Motion To Extend Trial GRANTED. Discovery cut-off date is set in accordance with new trial date. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HELENA HUOH VS. ARIEL BENTOLILA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Extend Time To Complete Discovery And To Have Discovery Mtns Heard
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 27, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT ARIEL BENTOLILA and ABENET TEKIE's Motion To Extend Time To Complete Discovery And To Have Discovery Motions Heard GRANTED. Trial is set for December 16, 2013. Mandatory Settlement Conference is continued to December 11, 2013. Defendant shall post $866.32 no later than November 27, 2013 by 4 p.m., to be remitted to the Plaintiff forthwith. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
